products.name: Custom UAV Carbon Propeller Development

evidence.snippet: Combining aerodynamic design, composite engineering and precision manufacturing, **_MAGCAD_** develops lightweight and efficient propulsion solutions tailored to demanding UAV missions. The company supports drone manufacturers and aerospace innovators with custom carbon propeller development and propulsion system optimization.

unresolved_questions: The services page (magcad.de/services) and projects page (magcad.de/projects) were both skipped due to class budget exhaustion; they likely contain fuller descriptions of individual service offerings and additional named project examples beyond the three project cards visible on the homepage.
StriekAir VTOL Propeller and Flowcopter Propulsion System appear as project cards on the homepage but lack detail pages — readiness and maturity cannot be confirmed without the /projects page.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance language found anywhere in the fetched corpus; all products default to unknown for those fields.

fetch_requests.reason: Services page would enumerate MAGCAD's full offering of engineering services including propeller design, simulation, and optimization — directly supports products and readiness classification.
Projects page would list all named project examples (e.g. StriekAir, Flowcopter, High-Speed) with descriptions, enabling better readiness and granularity classification.
References page may name additional customer-delivered products or systems that could qualify as production-readiness evidence.
